description: Top-level content bundle manifest. Apps pin a manifest_version (major) and lazily fetch content listed below. Audio files cached on first play.

legacy.note: v1 Flutter procedural/recorded sounds, kept for reference only. Will not ship in v2.0.

ambient.note: Pixabay-sourced loops. Files added in subsequent commits.

voice.note: Azure Neural HD TTS pre-rendered clips. Voices: en-US-Ava, en-US-Andrew, en-IN-Neerja, en-IN-Prabhat. Files added in subsequent commits.
